creator: freebsd-bugs@morgandavis.net
text: What is the procedure for requesting fixes/changes for the prebuilt packages so we can have both mozjpeg and webp tools installed on a single machine together without this cjpeg conflict? Since these two formats are important for modern web sites, not having these tools be able to coexist is creating some toolchain headaches.  If the package maintainer(s) can't resolve this, is there a work-around that doesn't require building patched versions from sources?
